name: Microwave Cranberry Orange Relish
recipeIngredient: 1 small Unpeeled orange, seeded and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Serve in sandwiches or with roast chicken, ham, turkey.
2. Process cranberries, orange, and apple until finely chopped. Place in a shallow microwavable casserole.
3. Stir in water, sugar, ginger, and nutmeg.
4. Microwave on High for 3 to 4 minutes; stir. Microwave on medium (50%) power for 2-3 minutes. Cool slightly.
5. Cover and refrigerate up to 2 weeks. Makes 2 1/4 cups. Preparation time: 10 minutes
